articles.title: Black Bears compete in Jim Kavanagh Legacy Invitational
articles.summary: The University of Maine track and field program competed in the Jim Kavanagh Legacy Invitational hosted by Holy Cross on Saturday April 18th. The Black Bears finished in 5th place with a total of 29 points.

articles.title: Garbett wins Steeplechase Debut at Sean Collier Invitational
articles.summary: The University of Maine track and field program competed in the Sean Collier Invitational hosted by MIT on Friday April 17th and Saturday April 18th.

articles.title: Maine earns 11-7 win over Binghamton
articles.summary: Madison Hand had five RBI in the win.

articles.title: Maine captures Six 1st Place Finishes at Jim Kavanagh Invitational
articles.summary: The University of Maine track and field program competed in the Jim Kavanagh Legacy Invitational hosted by Holy Cross on Saturday April 18th. The Black Bears finished in 2nd place with a total of 175 points.

articles.title: Black Bears finish Sean Collier Invitational with 4 Top 10 Finishes
articles.summary: The University of Maine track and field program competed in the Sean Collier Invitational hosted by MIT on Friday April 17th and Saturday April 18th.

articles.title: Baseball Splits Saturday Doubleheader at NJIT
articles.summary: The University of Maine baseball program split their Saturday doubleheader with NJIT to grab their third-straight series victory in conference play.

articles.title: Maine splits with Binghamton in America East play
articles.summary: The Black Bears walked it off for a 4-3 win in game two.

articles.title: Baseball Erased Early Deficit to Grab Sixth America East Victory of the Season
articles.summary: The University of Maine baseball program erased a three-run deficit to pick up the series opening win at NJIT on Friday Night.

articles.title: Samuel Tremblay named Outstanding Graduating International Student for the Maine Business School
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Samuel Tremblay of Quebec City is the Outstanding Graduating International Student for the Maine Business School. A business administration student majoring in management, Tremblay is a tutor, mentor, Maine Business School ambassador and president of the UMaine chapter of the Beta Gamma Sigma honor society.

articles.title: Zoe Furber named Outstanding Graduating International Student in the College of Earth, Life, and Health Sciences
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Zoe Furber of Vancouver, British Columbia is the Outstanding Graduating International Student in the College of Earth, Life, and Health Sciences. A double major in marine science and biology with a concentration in marine biology, she has been a member of the UMaine Field Hockey team since 2022 and was appointed captain in 2025.

articles.title: Brandon Holt named First Team All-American
articles.summary: Holt marks the 45th All-America selection in program history.

articles.title: Maine Athletics receives $500,000 gift to support Black Bear Student-Athlete Experience Fund
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine – Arthur S. Demoulas has committed $500,000 to support the men's ice hockey program through the Black Bear Student-Athlete Experience Fund.

articles.title: Holt, Nadeau named New England Hockey Writers Association All-Stars
articles.summary: Brandon Holt and Josh Nadeau were honored by the organization on Tuesday.

articles.title: Brandon Holt signs AHL contract with Tucson Roadrunners
articles.summary: Hockey East's Best Defensive Defenseman heads to the AHL

articles.title: Frank Djurasevic signs AHL deal with Toronto Marlies
articles.summary: Djurasevic, an alternate captain this season as a junior, recorded a career-high 61 blocks and had 14 points off of five goals and nine assists this year.

articles.title: Thomas Freel signs professional contract with Iowa Heartlanders
articles.summary: Freel captained the Black Bears this season after serving as an alternate captain during the 2024-25 season.

articles.title: Josh Nadeau signs professional contract with Laval Rocket
articles.summary: Laval is the top affiliate of the National Hockey League's Montreal Canadiens.

articles.title: WATCH: Season 4, Episode 4 of Journey North - Shift
articles.summary: Go inside and behind the scenes of Maine men's ice hockey with 'Journey North' the exclusive all-access show.

articles.title: Brandon Chabrier signs pro contract with Maine Mariners
articles.summary: Chabrier skated in 133 games as a Black Bear.

articles.title: Maine falls at Boston College in Hockey East Tournament quarterfinal
articles.summary: Maine's season ended with the playoff loss.

articles.title: Smith tabbed America East Women's Basketball Winter Scholar-Athlete Award Recipient
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Adrianna Smith has been named the America East Women's Basketball Winter Scholar Athlete Award recipient, as announced by the conference on Wednesday.

articles.title: Maine Athletics reveals Chappelle Court design, additional details for Morse Arena
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine – The University of Maine on Friday, April 3 announced additional plans for the interior design of Morse Arena, the new 106,000-square-foot basketball and football operations venue made possible by a $10 million gift from 1964 UMaine graduates Phillip and Susan Morse.

articles.title: Smith named ECAC Player of the Year
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- University of Maine forward Adrianna Smith has been named the Eastern College Athletic Conference (ECAC) Player of the Year, as announced on Wednesday, March 25.

articles.title: Women's Basketball falls in America East Championship at Vermont
articles.summary: BURLINGTON, Vt. -- Adrianna Smith posted her 58th career double-double but the Black Bears came up short in the America East Championship, falling by a final of 61-43 to No. 1 Vermont on Friday evening at Patrick Gymnasium.

articles.title: PREVIEW: Women's Basketball travels to Vermont for America East Championship
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The University of Maine women's basketball team (19-12) will appear in the conference title game for the 23rd time, and first since winning the 2024 title, when it travels to meet Vermont (26-7) in the Air Force Reserve America East Championship on Friday, March 13 at 5 p.m. live on ESPNU.

articles.title: Adrianna Smith named finalist for Becky Hammon Mid-Major Player of the Year
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- University of Maine forward Adrianna Smith has been named a finalist for the Becky Hammon Mid-Major Player of the Year Award presented by Her Hoop Stats.

articles.title: Air Force Reserve America East Women's Basketball Championship Central
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The No.2 seed University of Maine women's basketball team will meet No. 1 Vermont in the Air Force Reserve America East Championship game on Friday, March 13 at 5 p.m. at Patrick Gymnasium.

articles.title: Black Bears top Binghamton in America East semifinal, 60-56
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The University of Maine women's basketball team (19-12) earned a spot in the Air Force Reserve America East Championship game after a 60-56 semifinal victory over No. 3 Binghamton on Monday evening.

articles.title: Preview: Women's Basketball squares off with No. 3 Binghamton in America East semifinal
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The No. 2 seed University of Maine women's basketball team hosts No. 3 Binghamton on Monday, March 9 at 6 p.m. in the semifinal round of the Air Force Reserve America East playoffs. Limited tickets remain and can be purchased at GoBlackBears.com/tickets.

articles.title: America East semifinal tickets on sale now
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Tickets are on sale now for the University of Maine women's basketball team's 2026 Air Force Reserve America East semifinal round game which will take place on March 9 at 6 p.m. at Skip Chappelle Court against No. 3 Binghamton.

articles.title: Men's Basketball has Season come to an end on Saturday in America East Quarterfinals
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team had their season come to an end as they fell to #3 NJIT, 60-58.

articles.title: Preview: Black Bears Head to NJIT for America East Quarterfinals
articles.summary: The University of Maine men's basketball team begins their America East Playoffs on Saturday, March 7 at NJIT.

articles.title: Three Black Bears earn America East Regular Season Honors
articles.summary: The America East Conference announced on Friday morning that three Black Bears from the University of Maine men's basketball program earned an honor for their performances throughout the 2025-26 regular season.

articles.title: Men's Basketball falls in Regular Season Finale on Tuesday Night
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team fell in the regular season finale on Tuesday night, 67-56.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wraps up Regular Season on Tuesday against UMass Lowell
articles.summary: The University of Maine men's basketball team wraps up the regular season on Tuesday night against UMass Lowell.

articles.title: Flagg Named America East Rookie of the Week
articles.summary: The America East Conference announced on Monday morning that Ace Flagg of the University of Maine men's basketball team has been named the Rookie of the Week for the conference.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Falls at Binghamton on Saturday Afternoon
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team was defeated by Binghamton on Saturday afternoon, 74-67.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wraps up Final Road Trip of the Regular Season at Binghamton
articles.summary: The Black Bears won their second-straight America East game as they took down UAlbany, 70-59.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wins Second-Straight Conference Game on Thursday Night
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team took down UAlbany on Thursday night, 70-59.

articles.title: Football Announces Five Additions to Staff for 2026 Season
articles.summary: The University of Maine football program announces five new additions to their 2026 staff, including three Positional Coaches, their Sports Performance Coach and Equipment Manager.

articles.title: UMaine Football All Quarter-Century Team Announced
articles.summary: The UMaine All Quarter-Century Team honors 63 former Black Bears who were the top players at their respective positions during their time at UMaine.

articles.title: Five Black Bears Named to NFF Hampshire Honor Society
articles.summary: The National Football Foundation announced on Wednesday that five Black Bears were named members of the Hampshire Honor Society.

articles.title: Football Announces Game Time for all Home Games and CAA Matchups
articles.summary: The University of Maine football program has announced their kickoffs for all home games and for CAA road matchups for the 2026 season.

articles.title: Football Announces 2026 Spring Ball Schedule
articles.summary: The University of Maine football program has announced their spring ball practice schedule, including their annual Jeff Cole Memorial Spring Game which will be held on Saturday, April 25.

articles.title: UMaine announces Family & Friends, Homecoming Dates
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine – The University of Maine has announced the 2026 dates for its Family & Friends and Homecoming weekends.

articles.title: 51 Black Bears Named to CAA Commissioner's Honor Roll
articles.summary: The CAA announced on Wednesday afternoon that 51 Black Bears were named to Commissioner's Academic Honor Roll for the 2025 Fall Semester.

articles.title: Football to host annual Pro Day on Friday, March 27 at Mahaney Dome
articles.summary: The University of Maine football program will hold its annual Pro Day workouts for National Football League scouts on March 27 from 11am-1pm at Mahaney Dome on campus.

articles.title: UMaine men’s hockey navigates new transfer landscape while seeking bounceback season
articles.summary: Amateurism has been replaced by professionalism in college sports, which has led to a flurry of offseason activity that mimics trades and contract wars in pro sports.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine men’s hockey adds 6 players in transfer portal including 2 from rival schools
articles.summary: Sophomore right wing Lee Parks from UMass Lowell and sophomore defenseman Alexander Bales from Providence College will join the Black Bears.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine defenseman picked as first team All-American
articles.summary: Brandon Holt led the Black Bears in scoring with 32 points on six goals and 26 assists. All are career-highs as were his 47 blocked shots.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: 9 UMaine men’s hockey players enter transfer portal
articles.summary: The group includes two goalies and follows a disappointing 18-14-3 season for the Black Bears.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine hockey’s Owen Fowler will return to team next season
articles.summary: Fowler has a fifth year of eligibility because he was injured and sat out his second season at UMass Lowell as a medical redshirt before transferring to UMaine.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Former UMaine hockey player from Market Basket family donates $500K to program
articles.summary: Arthur S. Demoulas was a freshman in UMaine's first men’s hockey team in the new era in 1977-78 and has been a supporter ever since.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine hockey ticket prices increasing as much as 40% next year
articles.summary: The hike is based on an analysis by a sports entertainment and marketing firm that compared UMaine’s price structure with its competitors and included feedback from a fan survey.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine hockey’s alternate captain is leaving to play in the AHL
articles.summary: Frank Djurasevic has signed a contract with the American Hockey League’s Toronto Marlies, and is the second UMaine player to sign a professional contract.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Why Josh Nadeau made a ‘tough decision’ to leave UMaine hockey for the AHL
articles.summary: The 22-year-old said he felt it was time to “move up to the next level” after three years in Orono.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: After disappointing year for UMaine hockey, Albin Boija is coming back with a mission
articles.summary: Boija, who will be a senior, lost his job to freshman Mathis Rousseau at the end of this past season.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine hockey defenseman beginning pro career with Maine Mariners
articles.summary: Brandon Chabrier signed with the Portland team on Tuesday evening.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Weak goaltending and bad culture define UMaine men’s hockey’s disappointing season
articles.summary: The Black Bears ended the season 18-14-3 and was bounced in the Hockey East quarterfinals with a 5-0 loss to Boston College.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Boston College ends season for UMaine hockey with convincing 5-0 playoff win
articles.summary: It was the sixth time the Black Bears have been shut out this season.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: For 1st time in a generation, UMaine hockey has 2 players on top all-conference team
articles.summary: Senior defenseman Brandon Holt and junior right wing Josh Nadeau were named to the All-Hockey East first team, as chosen by the league’s coaches.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: How to watch UMaine hockey take on Boston College in Friday’s playoff battle
articles.summary: The two teams split a regular season series at Boston College in November, with the Eagles winning the first game and UMaine securing a 3-0 victory the following night.
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine hockey players know they are 1 win away from filling the TD Garden again
articles.summary: If the fifth-seeded Black Bears can beat fourth seed Boston College in Friday’s 7 p.m. Hockey East quarterfinals, they'll make it to the Hockey East semifinal.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine hockey’s top scorer not expected back this season due to undisclosed injury
articles.summary: Justin Poirer has five multiple-goal games, including three two-goal games in a row in an overtime victory over UMass Lowell and a sweep of Lindenwood.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine men’s hockey will rely on its top-scoring line in quarterfinal game
articles.summary: Junior Sully Scholle, senior left wing Owen Fowler and junior right wing Josh Nadeau have been on a tear of late.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine’s Brandon Holt and Owen Fowler earn Hockey East awards
articles.summary: Holt was named the league’s best defensive defenseman. Fowler was chosen the co-best defensive forward.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine draws Boston College in playoff clash of inconsistent hockey teams
articles.summary: They have both underwhelming seasons but the good news for them is that one of them will be two wins away from an NCAA Tournament berth after Friday night.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Here’s what UMaine’s basketball court will look like in new $80 million arena
articles.summary: The facility is expected to be completed and in use during the 2027-28 basketball season. Construction began this past fall.
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine basketball’s Adrianna Smith wins another player of the year award
articles.summary: The 6-foot native of Reston, Virginia, finished the season as the America East leader in scoring, rebounding, assists, and double-doubles.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine women’s basketball had good season, but its future is uncertain
articles.summary: The Black Bears had their season ended by top seed Vermont 61-43 in the America East championship game, last Friday night.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Vermont women earn another trip to NCAA tournament with win over UMaine
articles.summary: The defending champion Catamounts rattled off a 19-5 run spanning the first and second quarters and never looked back en route to a 61-43 victory.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: How to watch UMaine women’s basketball play for a spot in the NCAA tournament
articles.summary: In the 12 previous times that the UMaine women have faced a top seed in the conference tournament, they have won only once.
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: New country, new language haven’t stopped this Spanish point guard on the court in Maine
articles.summary: Spaniard Olivia Alvarez has made a smooth transition and has played an important role in the University of Maine’s successful run to Friday’s America East championship game against Vermont.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine women need this rare type of win to make the NCAA tournament
articles.summary: Maine hasn't beaten a top seed in a conference tournament game since March 7, 1998.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Former high school rivals team up for crucial 3-pointer in UMaine win over Binghamton
articles.summary: For three years in high school, Sarah Talon and Emmie Streams were adversaries for their respective Class AA North schools.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Watch UMaine football players get loud to support the women’s basketball team
articles.summary: “Black Bears take care of Black Bears.”
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine fans created such an ‘electric’ atmosphere that players couldn’t hear their coaches
articles.summary: “I just thought it was an unbelievable environment for women’s basketball,” Binghamton coach Mary Grimes said after the game.
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine women’s basketball is heading to the America East championship game
articles.summary: The No. 2 Black Bears defeated the No. 3 Binghamton Bearcats 60-56 in front of a raucous crowd in Orono.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Ace Flagg named to all-rookie team amid strong start at UMaine
articles.summary: Current and former coaches have stressed the on-court toughness of the 19-year-old whose nickname is the "Honey Badger."
articles.author: Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine women’s basketball thumps UNH
articles.summary: The 18-12 Black Bears, winners of eight of their last nine, will now host Binghamton (New York) in a semifinal match, Monday at 6 p.m.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine women’s basketball expects tough playoff test from UNH
articles.summary: The Black Bears have 12 consecutive wins over the Wildcats, but nearly lost that streak in a recent meeting.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine’s Adrianna Smith named America East player of the year
articles.summary: On Saturday, Smith became the first player in America East history to register 1,000 career points, 1,000 rebounds and 400 assists.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney and Matt Junker

articles.title: UMaine football has a quarterback battle this spring
articles.summary: Veteran backups Caden Drezek and Eddie Buehler will be competing for the job along with redshirt freshman Michael McMaugh.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football coach Jordan Stevens among those named to school’s All Quarter-Century team
articles.summary: The players will be honored at the annual UMaine football alumni dinner in Brighton, Massachusetts, on June 27.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football looking to fill hole in schedule after California school changes divisions
articles.summary: The Black Bears already had an Oct. 10 bye on their schedule but another bye was added recently when a Nov. 7 home game against Sacramento State fell through.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football will be paid $625K to play Penn State next year
articles.summary: The UMaine-Penn State game will be played at the West Shore Home Field at Beaver Stadium in University Park, Pennsylvania, which is the second-largest stadium in the United States.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football loses key players to Michigan State and Rutgers
articles.summary: Two prominent members of the University of Maine football team’s defense are departing to play in the Big Ten Conference.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football earning $750K for trips to Boston College, Appalachian State next fall
articles.summary: The Black Bears will pocket $350,000 for their trip to Boone, North Carolina to play Appalachian State on Sept. 5, 2026, and $400,000 for the game in Chestnut Hill, Massachusetts vs. BC on Sept. 19.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Top high school football star staying in Maine to play for Black Bears
articles.summary: Cordell Jones helped lead the Bulldogs to three straight appearances in the Class A State Finals.
articles.author: CBS 13

articles.title: Star linebacker for UMaine football named 1st team all-conference
articles.summary: Five other Black Bears earned spots on the second or third teams, and four more were given honorable mentions.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football has a chance to play spoiler against its biggest rival
articles.summary: UNH needs a win against UMaine to keep its playoff hopes alive. The Black Bears can keep the Wildcats out of the postseason and take home the Brice-Cowell Musket at the same time.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football looked like it had stage fright with season on the line
articles.summary: This group of Black Bears had never played a game in November with league championship and Football Championship Subdivision implications.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football falls to Rhode Island, dashing conference title hopes
articles.summary: The University of Rhode Island’s league-leading Rams thumped the Black Bears 45-13 in Orono on Saturday.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Don’t tell UMaine football, but every game is a playoff game from here on out
articles.summary: Technically, Saturday’s University of Maine home football game is a regular season contest. But for all intents and purposes it’s a playoff game for the Black Bears.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football wins 6th straight game to keep playoff hopes alive
articles.summary: The Black Bears have now won six straight games in a row after dropping their first four, continuing a drastic turnaround.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: How UMaine football went from rock-bottom to conference contender
articles.summary: The Black Bears have bounced back in dramatic fashion, winning five straight entering a Saturday CAA game at Hampton in Virginia.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football defeats Stony Brook for its 5th win in a row
articles.summary: It is the first five-game winning streak for UMaine since the 2018 season, when the Black Bears reached the Football Championship Subdivision playoff semifinals.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Top Canadian kicking prospect has been perfect so far for UMaine football
articles.summary: There has been one player who has been the model of consistency: placekicker Sam Tremblay.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football has quickly transformed into a playoff-caliber team
articles.summary: UMaine head coach Jordan Stevens said the biggest reason behind the turnaround is the way his defensive players have improved their tackling.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine football wins ninth straight Homecoming game
articles.summary: No matter what kind of season the University of Maine’s football team is having, Homecoming has been good to the Black Bears in recent years.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine softball edges Husson 2-1 on pinch-hit home run
articles.summary: It was the first time the two neighbors from different divisions had met since 2014. UMaine has won all 16 meetings.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: Former high school teammate recruited UMaine baseball’s top hitter to Orono
articles.summary: Juju Stevens said he and redshirt senior relief pitcher Sebastian Holt have some “unfinished business” this season.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney

articles.title: UMaine baseball is finding some wins after slow start
articles.summary: Ninth-year UMaine head coach Nick Derba said he feels good about his team’s progress.
articles.author: Larry Mahoney
